_metadata.retentionPolicy: Personal facts reviewed annually; stale facts (>2 years) flagged for review
_metadata.purpose: Maintain context for AI assistant about the user

facts.fact: Philippe is from the Netherlands, living in Vietnam since September 2024
Works on Blender, After Effects, Unreal Engine for creative skills
Interested in stock trading as potential career option
Has a girlfriend who works in Vietnam
When Philippe says 'handle it', he means make the decision yourself
Runs Hostinger VPS with Docker container where Marvin is hosted
Philippe consistently prioritizes actionable signal context and UX precision, explicitly asking for explanation of implications beyond raw alerts.
Philippe is currently visiting Da Lat region in Vietnam for one week

Backup coverage confirmed: snapshot system + automated off-host backup exists (no local workspace backup script needed). Durable instruction: do not re-raise as open security finding just because no local backup script is present.

OAuth token behavior clarified: tokens need renewal every 10-14 days in practice, current posture is monitored-manual renewal (not unattended long-lived token reliance). Durable instruction: do not describe as long-lived-token problem unless token behavior materially changes.

File access auditing: confirmed no additional users for the time being (multi-user audit trails not a practical concern). Durable instruction: classify as INFO/operational hardening only unless host exposure increases or multiple operators introduced.

Config-edit discipline: must present exact diff before applying when Philippe asks to see proposed config changes. Do not assume custom model is valid just because alias appears to switch successfully once.

Steady-state preference: prefers preserving steady-state system over stacking additional hardening layers without evidence of need. Applied to strict webhook payload schema enforcement and other hardening proposals.

Nightly review suppression rule: overnight review jobs must check recent daily memory first (today + previous 3 days) and suppress recently fixed/accepted/investigated items unless concrete evidence of drift/failure/reopening
Config-edit discipline: must present exact diff before applying when Philippe asks to see proposed config changes; quote exact live values from tool state after approval-gated changes
Mission Control build helpers: use Agent Team for implementation/review quality and Stitch MCP export as first-class bridge between Stitch design and real build

Identity/memory storage model: SOUL.md/IDENTITY.md = stable core traits, .learnings/corrections.md = explicit behavioral shaping, MEMORY.md = durable relationship/working-style changes only; no separate identity log, no passing impressions in core files
Morning Meeting reporting: autonomous workspace home-improvement work must be explicitly included with what changed, why, expected benefit, and rollback
